inputs.label: Component Failure Rate
inputs.businessContext: The constant failure rate per component (λ) assuming exponential distribution.

businessContext_i18n.en: The constant failure rate per component (λ) assuming exponential distribution.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Üstel dağılım varsayımıyla bileşen başına sabit arıza oranı (λ).

inputs.label: Mission Time
inputs.businessContext: The duration for which the system must operate without failure.

businessContext_i18n.en: The duration for which the system must operate without failure.

inputs.label: Number of Components in Series
inputs.businessContext: Number of identical components connected in series within each string.

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of identical components connected in series within each string.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Her bir dizede seri bağlı özdeş bileşen sayısı.

inputs.label: Number of Parallel Strings
inputs.businessContext: Number of identical series strings operating in parallel (active redundancy).

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of identical series strings operating in parallel (active redundancy).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Paralel çalışan (aktif yedekleme) özdeş seri dize sayısı.
